scripts.bundle:monitor: bun run build:ci && bun run bundle:analyze
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts e2e/homepage-portal-stability.spec.ts e2e/calculator-critical.spec.ts e2e/director-guide-critical.spec.ts e2e/payslip-regression.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=1 && (test -n "$CI" || open audit-outputs/playwright-report/index.html)
scripts.test:e2e:critical: bun run test:e2e:smoke && bun run test:e2e:golden
scripts.test:e2e:critical:ci: NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_ANALYTICS=true NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID=G-TESTLOCAL1 playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts e2e/homepage-portal-stability.spec.ts e2e/calculator-critical.spec.ts e2e/director-guide-critical.spec.ts e2e/payslip-regression.spec.ts e2e/golden-master-PERFECT.spec.ts e2e/analytics-consent.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=1
scripts.fix-all: biome check --write . && bun run typecheck && bun run check-version && bun run check:env-contract && bun run check:analytics-events && bun run check:test-skips
scripts.check:repo: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run typecheck:tests && bun run check-version && bun run check:env-contract && bun run check:analytics-events && bun run check:test-skips && bun run check:tax-imports && bun run check:tax-facts && bun run check:rate-freshness
scripts.clean: rm -rf .next coverage playwright-report test-results blob-report audit-outputs/coverage audit-outputs/playwright-report audit-outputs/test-results audit-outputs/blob-report *.tsbuildinfo || true
scripts.clean:reports: rm -rf playwright-report test-results blob-report audit-outputs/playwright-report audit-outputs/test-results audit-outputs/coverage audit-outputs/blob-report || true
scripts.clean:test: rm -rf coverage playwright-report test-results blob-report audit-outputs/coverage audit-outputs/playwright-report audit-outputs/test-results audit-outputs/blob-report playwright/.auth/storageState.json || true
scripts.clean:dev: bun run clean && bun run dev
scripts.clean:all: bun run clean:reports && bun run clean:cache && rm -rf node_modules && bun install
scripts.test:quick: bun run test:no-coverage && bun run test:e2e:critical
scripts.test:full: bun run test:ci && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:clear: rm -rf playwright-report test-results blob-report audit-outputs/playwright-report audit-outputs/test-results audit-outputs/blob-report playwright/.auth/storageState.json && echo '✅ E2E test artifacts cleared'
scripts.audit:security:fix: bun pm audit --fix && bun run audit:security
scripts.ci: bun run check:repo && bun run build:ci && bun run test:full && bun run audit:deps
scripts.dev-setup: bun run clean:all && bun run fix-all && bun run dev
scripts.harness:local: bun run check:repo && bun run test:quick && bun run build:ci
scripts.harness:release: bun run check:repo && bun run audit:deps && bun run test:no-coverage && bun run build:release && bun run release:report:status
scripts.release: bun run clean && bun run check:repo && bun run test && bun run build:release:analyze && bun run audit:deps
scripts.monitor-all: bun run audit:security:summary && bun run bundle:analyze
scripts.deploy: bun run clean && bun run release && echo '✅ Ready for deployment!'
scripts.debug: bun run clean && bun run typecheck && bun run build:ci
